```python
class Solution:
    def isPalindrome(self, s: str) -> bool:
        s = ''.join(filter(str.isalnum, s)).lower()
        left, right = 0, len(s) - 1
        while left < right:
            if s[left] != s[right]:
                return False
            left += 1
            right -= 1
        return True
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(n)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: The solution first filters out non-alphanumeric characters and converts the string to lowercase. It then uses a two-pointer technique to compare characters from the start and end, moving towards the center. This approach is efficient as it only requires a single pass through the string.
